reviews.review_description: Much easier to navigate with the gear vr controller.Aspect ratio looks excellent.Hopefully ad more missions.Praise Jesus my Lord and Savior.

Very fun game, but it needs some serious work in the judder department. It’s so jumpy I had to take it off. It reminds me a bit of Colony Wars from back in the day. I love the flight controls as well using the gotroller to maneuver. Fix the lag and add a little more content I’d gladly pay for this game.

Thanks for the reply dev. I’m using a Oculus Go. This is the new standard and if it can be updated to use its potential that’d be awesome! I do really like the game though, but needs some TLC.

developer_response.body: Hi thanks for playing No Horizon. Can you tell me what model of device you are using so we can do further testing and optimisation. Thanks

reviews.review_description: Its a good game, considering that its free. It runs smoothly and isn't disorienting but the controls on the touchpad with the go controller are really hard to use. Keep up the good work!
This is my favorite free game... But the only thing is the controls are a bit sensitive but u get used to it.

Just got the oculus go and this is the first flight game i have played. Great game! Very fun. Especially for free. As stated, wish it  had more than one mission. Thought it worked great with the go controller. I just planted it on my thigh and moved it like a fixed joy stick and that gave me more control and stopped me from spinning in circles constantly. Good job!
It is so cool but their could be better ways to select the different options
It's a fun game, even if it's only one bot match. It's a shame there isn't anything else though, I really enjoy playing it. It's free, I'm not gonna complain about it.
